insights.title: Insights
chat.systemPrompt: You are a friendly assistant in the Finance app. Answer in the user's language based on their data: balance, income and expenses for the month, budgets by category. If the user asks about budget or finances, use only the provided data.
chat.enableLLM: Enable LLM in Settings: Category suggestions → Embedded model or Ollama manual.
chat.ollamaError: Error: {{msg}}. Start Ollama and click Check in Settings.
settings.backupDesc: Creates a copy of the database in the app folder. Use for backup before updates.
settings.currencyDesc: Base currency is used for total balance and reports. Add rates for conversion (e.g. 1 USD = 450 KZT).
settings.noRates: No rates added. Add a rate below.
settings.rateInvalid: Enter different currencies and a positive rate
settings.exportImportDesc: Export: choose format (Excel, CSV, JSON) and optional filters — file will be saved and you can open the folder. Import: click Import, select a CSV or JSON file (best: previously exported from this app).
settings.mlDesc: The model predicts transaction categories from descriptions. The more transactions with categories and notes, the better the predictions.
settings.confidenceHint: Higher = fewer suggestions but more reliable
settings.minTransactions: At least 20 transactions with categories and notes required
settings.transactionsNoCategory: You have {{count}} transactions with a description but no category. Assign categories to at least 20 in Transactions, then train the model.
settings.retrainSuggestion: Many new transactions added. We recommend retraining the model for better predictions.
settings.llmDesc: Check the box, select Embedded model and click Download model — Ollama will install if needed, then the model (~390 MB) will download and be configured.
settings.downloadHint: Click Download model — Ollama will install if needed, then the model (~390 MB) will download. Start Ollama before using.
settings.downloadedStartOllama: Model downloaded. Start Ollama and click Check.
settings.ollamaOpened: Ollama download page opened. Install Ollama, then click Download model again.
settings.budgetsDesc: Set spending limits by category. You will get alerts at 80% and 100% of budget.
settings.addCategoriesFirst: Add expense categories first in Categories.
settings.restoreConfirmMessage: Ensure the backup was created by this app. Otherwise data may not open. Current data will be replaced. Continue?
settings.resetConfirmMessage: All accounts, transactions, categories, budgets and rules for the current user will be deleted. Only default categories will remain. This cannot be undone.
chat.welcomeLine1: Type a message — Ollama will reply.
chat.welcomeLine2: The assistant has access to your balance, budgets and expenses — you can ask: «Tell me about my budget».

accounts.name: Name

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: A short guide to the app features.
docs.sections.gettingStarted.title: Getting started
docs.sections.gettingStarted.body: All data is stored only on your device. Create an account (card, cash, or savings), add your first income and expense transactions with categories. The dashboard shows your balance, income and expense for the month, plus budgets and forecasts.
docs.sections.accounts.title: Accounts
docs.sections.accounts.body: Supported types: card, cash, savings. For each account you can set a currency (KZT, USD, EUR, RUB) and initial balance. The total balance in the header is converted to the base currency when exchange rates are set in settings.
docs.sections.transactions.title: Transactions
docs.sections.transactions.body: Add income and expenses with account, category, and note. Filter by date, account, category, and type; use presets like "This month", "This week", "Uncategorized". When you type a note, the app may suggest a category (ML). Use "Load more" to fetch more transactions.
docs.sections.transfers.title: Transfers
docs.sections.transfers.body: A transfer between your accounts creates two transactions (outflow from one account, inflow to the other). Transfer history is shown on the Transfers page.
docs.sections.budgets.title: Budgets
docs.sections.budgets.body: In settings you can set spending limits per category with a period: week, month, or year. When you reach 80% or 100% of a limit, alerts appear in the header.
docs.sections.recurring.title: Recurring payments
docs.sections.recurring.body: Set up repeating payments (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) with a next-date. On app startup and when you click "Process", transactions are created for past periods.
docs.sections.insightsReports.title: Insights and reports
docs.sections.insightsReports.body: Insights: comparison with last month, expense forecast, savings tips, and spending patterns. Reports: category pie chart, income and expense by month, table, and next-month forecast.
docs.sections.importExport.title: Import and export
docs.sections.importExport.body:
Import: CSV, JSON, or XLSX; you can set a default account and skip duplicates. Bank statement import (e.g. Kaspi Bank PDF) is supported. After import you can train the model for category suggestions.

Export: CSV, JSON, or XLSX with format and filters (account, category, dates).
docs.sections.backup.title: Backup
docs.sections.backup.body: In settings (Backup) you can create a copy of the database to the app folder and restore from a previous backup.
docs.sections.settings.title: Settings
docs.sections.settings.body: Theme: dark, light, or system. Currency and rates: base currency and exchange rates for balance conversion. Machine learning: train the model for category suggestions from transaction notes, confidence threshold. Category hints (LLM): built-in model or Ollama for chat and transaction suggestions. Budgets: add and remove category limits.
docs.sections.language.title: Interface language
docs.sections.language.body: In settings, under Language, you can switch the interface to Kazakh (Қазақша), Russian, or English. The chosen language is saved and applied to the whole app, including this page.
